text_excerpt: News | Lord Sarfraz Skip to main content The Lord Sarfraz Main navigation Home About Lord Sarfraz News In Parliament Coat of Arms Contact The Lord Sarfraz News Lord Sarfraz attends Defence Cyber Marvel 2026 Friday, 13 February, 2026 As Honorary Colonel of 31 Signal Squadron, Lord Sarfraz attended Defence Cyber Marvel 2026 in Singapore. Defence Cyber Marvel is one of the most demanding multinational cyber defence exercises in the world. Held from 9 to 13 February 2026, the fifth edition of the exercise brought together over 2,500 personnel from 29 nations, drawn from 70 different organisations to form 36 competing teams...
